name: Coffee Orange Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, sour cream, oil, water, eggs, chocolate fudge pudding mix, coffee liqueur, orange peel, and cinnamon.
3. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until blended, scraping sides of the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on medium speed for 4 minutes.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F oven for 50-60 minutes or until tested done.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Remove from the pan and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar if desired.
